# Acme Shop About

ACME Shop is an online shopping platform founded in 2015 and headquartered in Taipei, focused on home & living goods and consumer electronics accessories. Beyond e-commerce, it operates three physical stores—Taipei Xinyi, Taichung Xitun, and Kaohsiung Dream Mall—each offering store-pickup. Its catalog blends distributed brands with the private label acme-basics, which comprises roughly 30% and emphasizes high value-for-money essentials. These products carry a longer warranty; see product-warranty.

[Source: acme_shop_about.md]
